nasb.text: Bring out the people who are blind, even though they have eyes, And the deaf, even though they have ears.

esv.text: Bring out the people who are blind, yet have eyes, who are deaf, yet have ears!

cnv.text: 你要把那些有眼卻看不見， 有耳卻聽不到的人民領出來。

ccb.text: “要把那些有眼看不见、 有耳听不见的人带出来。

csbs.text: 你要带出那有眼却瞎， 有耳却聋的民！
